Id1.text: Abdulsalami Abubakar, born in Minna, was the Nigerian Chief of Defense Staff.

Id2.text: Minna was the birthplace of Abdulsalami Abubakar, who worked as the Nigerian Chief of the Defence Staff.

Id3.text: Abdulsalami Abubakar who was born in Minna, was the Chief of the Defence Staff in Nigeria.
